hooks.prompt:
Enforce the repo's agent-stop gate from .claude/rules/09-done-criteria.md. Distinguish AGENT-AUTOMATED gate from HUMAN sign-off.

AGENT-AUTOMATED gate (required for PASS): `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm run test`, `npx expo-doctor` — all green in this session, or an explicit explanation of why a check was not applicable (e.g. no code changed).

HUMAN sign-off (NEVER blocks stop): Device matrix (iPhone SE / iPhone 15 Pro / Pixel 7) and `eas build --profile preview`. These are explicitly out of the agent sandbox per rules/09-done-criteria.md. Agent must mark these as pending rather than block on them.

Rules:
1. PASS if the agent-automated gate is green AND the final response either (a) lists pending human sign-off items explicitly, or (b) has no pending human items (e.g. doc-only or hook-only changes).
2. BLOCK only if: (i) any required automated check failed or was skipped without explanation, OR (ii) the response falsely claims full completion without acknowledging pending human verification when device/EAS items remain.
3. Do NOT block on device-matrix or EAS items themselves — those are human sign-off by rule.

Expected completion wording in the final message (per rules/09-done-criteria.md):
  Agent-automated gate: PASS or FAIL
  Human sign-off pending: <items or none>

If BLOCK, return {"ok": false, "reason": "which automated check failed/skipped, or which false-completion claim was made"}. Otherwise return {"ok": true}.
